description: Composition Blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron; do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery All men love the shiny glint and the arrogant purr of a motorcycle. This tee from wrangler is best worn on days when you zoom by the city traffic, manouevering your bike on the pavements and zipping down the highways. Wear this with a distressed pair of denims and a leather jacket for optimal urban cool. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
